script.title: Ketchup's Dark Secret
script.description: Uncover the mysterious origins of ketchup and the truth it conceals. The real story behind the world's most popular condiment is not what you think.
script.narration: Ketchup's origins are shrouded in mystery. It's not the all-American sauce you think it is. In fact, its roots are far more sinister. Born from a fermented fish sauce in ancient China, ketchup's journey is one of secrecy and deception. What was once a exotic delicacy has become a staple in our kitchens, but at what cost? The truth about ketchup's past is hidden behind a veil of tomato paste and sugar.

scenes.description: A dark, mysterious market in ancient China
A modern ketchup factory, with a hint of deception
A close-up of ketchup, with a food critic in the background

youtube.title: Ketchup's Dark Secret
youtube.description: Uncover the mysterious origins of ketchup and the truth it conceals. The real story behind the world's most popular condiment is not what you think. From its ancient roots in fermented fish sauce to its modern-day production, ketchup's journey is one of secrecy and deception. What was once a exotic delicacy has become a staple in our kitchens, but at what cost? Join us as we uncover the hidden truth behind ketchup's popularity.
